blended.narrative: Canyon Ski Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 789 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
